CREATE TABLE test_floats (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT(24));
CREATE TABLE other_floats (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT(53));
SELECT id, value FROM test_floats WHERE value < 3.0;
SELECT id, value FROM other_floats WHERE value BETWEEN 1.0 AND 5.0;
SELECT id, value FROM test_floats WHERE ROUND(value) = 2;
SELECT id, value FROM other_floats WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM other_floats);
SELECT t.id, t.value + o.value FROM test_floats t JOIN other_floats o ON t.id = o.id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_floats WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_floats SET value = value * 2 WHERE value < 4;
SELECT id, value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_floats UNION SELECT id, value FROM other_floats) AS combined WHERE value > 3.0;
CREATE TABLE combined_floats AS SELECT * FROM test_floats UNION ALL SELECT * FROM other_floats;
SELECT value FROM combined_floats WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT DISTINCT ROUND(value, 2) FROM other_floats WHERE value > 1.0;
